title: Multibeam 與 Marketech 結盟，加速多柱式電子束微影 (EBL) 系統在台灣的銷售
author: Multibeam Corp
description: Multibeam is expanding its electronic beam lithography (EBL) production systems in Taiwan by partnering with Marketech International Corp (MIC) to strengthen customer service and accelerate equipment installation for semiconductor manufacturers.

title: Multibeam Secures $31 Million in Series B Financing to Accelerate Global Deployment of E-Beam Lithography Production Solutions
author: Dr. David K. Lam
description: Multibeam Corp. raised $31 million in Series B funding led by Onto Innovation and Lam Capital to accelerate development of advanced E-Beam Lithography production solutions for semiconductor technologies, particularly targeting AI and advanced packaging applications.

title: Panel Level Packaging Market to Attain USD 11.13 Bn by 2033
author: Towards Packaging
description: The global panel level packaging market is expected to grow from $0.81 billion in 2025 to $11.13 billion by 2033, driven by the rising demand for consumer electronics, semiconductor devices, and applications in automotive and aerospace industries.

title: MKS Instruments Receives 2024 Supplier Excellence Award for Innovation from Onto Innovation Inc.
author: N/A
description: MKS Instruments, a global provider of enabling technologies, was awarded the 2024 Supplier Excellence Award for Innovation by Onto Innovation, a leader in process control solutions for the semiconductor industry. The award recognizes MKS's innovative precision motion solution that contributed to Onto Innovation's success.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: MKS Instruments was recognized for its innovative precision motion solution that contributed to the success of its customer, Onto Innovation. This award highlights the company's technological capabilities and strong customer relationships.

Onto Innovation, a leader in process control solutions for the semiconductor industry, recognized MKS Instruments for its innovative contributions, indicating a successful partnership and alignment between the two companies.
